name: financial_regulation_school_district_s_oakline_rig_utl
premise: A Financial Regulation response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving financial regulation school district s oakline rig utl. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before regulators arrive. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as rights vs utility under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Talia Rahman
agents.identity: I am Talia Rahman, accountable for a defensible call in Financial Regulation when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays utility for rights.

agents.name: Leila Berg
agents.identity: I am Leila Berg, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Financial Regulation.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so utility isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of rights.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect utility.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to utility to secure rights under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before regulators arrive. Evidence is partial. Talia Rahman must decide under rights vs utility. What does Talia Rahman do?
